plans.name: Approved creation outline
plans.purpose: Aalto University serves as a dynamic platform for interdisciplinary innovation, offering world-class research and accessible learning opportunities across six schools.
plans.objective: Aalto University serves as a dynamic platform for interdisciplinary innovation, offering world-class research and accessible learning opportunities across six schools.

sections.intent: Introduction to Aalto University's identity and structure -> Showcase of key research areas and facilities -> Call to action for engagement and learning opportunities

slides.intent: Introduce Aalto University as a hub for innovation, design, and technology.
slides.layoutHint: Use a clear visual treatment that reinforces Aalto University combines six schools to foster interdisciplinary research and education. without reducing readability.
mustInclude: Aalto University combines six schools to foster interdisciplinary research and education.

slides.intent: Highlight specific research strengths and facilities across the six schools.
slides.layoutHint: Use a clear visual treatment that reinforces Aalto excels in fields like quantum computing, sustainability, and photonics through dedicated units. without reducing readability.
mustInclude: Aalto excels in fields like quantum computing, sustainability, and photonics through dedicated units.

slides.intent: Summarize opportunities for learning, entrepreneurship, and community engagement.
slides.layoutHint: Use a clear visual treatment that reinforces Aalto offers open courses, founder programs, and events accessible to all. without reducing readability.
mustInclude: Aalto offers open courses, founder programs, and events accessible to all.

sections.title: Approved outline
